tint.$description: Optional tint multiplied into disabled controls. Default: no tint.

overlay.$description: Optional overlay blended over disabled controls. Alpha is blend factor.

barWidth.$description: Dropdown list vertical scrollbar width; fallback is components.scrollbar.layout.size.

scrollbarVSeparation.$description: Pixels between dropdown list content and vertical scrollbar (ScrollContainer scrollbar_v_separation; also used when sizing rows).

maxUniformContentWidth.$description: Hard pixel cap on uniform dropdown row width (label + row chrome). 0: derive from maxUniformContentWidthFraction only.

maxUniformContentWidthFraction.$description: Upper bound as a fraction of viewport width (minus margins) for uniform row width before shell inset.

scrollbarVSeparation.$description: ScrollContainer scrollbar_v_separation for settings scroll areas (0 keeps legacy layout).

minLength.$description: Minimum scrollbar grabber length (applied via VScrollBar theme constant overrides).
